case_title: CEP INTERNATIONAL INC. VS AMENEX INSURANCE AGENCY

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO OROBO OSAGIE (AMENEX) SHOWS ILLEGIBLE SIGNATURE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CEP INTERNATIONAL INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMENEX INSURANCE AGENCY $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $263.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY CEP INTERNATIONAL INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AMENEX INSURANCE AGENCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
